name: test-openspec-todolist
description: sdd/ ├── README.md                  # High-level overview and how to use this SDD ├── CONVENTIONS.md             # This file serves as a living reference for humans and AI coding agents (like those in AntiGravity, Aider, Claude Code, etc.). It enforces consistency in how the SDD is structured, written, and maintained. ├── ARCHITECTURE.md            # High-level system design ├── REQUIREMENTS.md            # Functional & non-functional requirements ├── DATA_MODEL.md              # Data structures, schemas, ER diagrams ├── API_SPEC.md                # API endpoints (use OpenSpec format) ├── COMPONENTS/                # One file per major component │   ├── component-auth.md │   ├── component-payments.md │   └── ... ├── DIAGRAMS/                  # PlantUML, Mermaid, or exported images ├── GLOSSARY.md └── CHANGELOG.md               # Track major SDD updates
